violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as fish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked chicken) in the sushi prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as cooked chicken during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

Reduced oxygen packaged seafood (tuna) was observed thawing with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. ROP tuna was observed held at 37 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The person in charge removed the ROP tuna from the package at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
